_description: Email MCP Server configuration. Copy this file to 'config.json', fill in your values, and remove or ignore all '_*' keys — they are documentation only and are stripped at load time.

_provider_info.description: Email provider preset. When set, automatically fills imap_host, imap_port, imap_use_ssl, smtp_host, smtp_port, smtp_use_tls, smtp_use_ssl. Any field you explicitly set in this file overrides the preset. Set to null to configure all IMAP/SMTP fields manually.

_email_info.description: Your full email address used both for authentication and as the From address when sending.

_password_info.description: Account password or app-specific password. For Gmail, Yahoo, and iCloud with 2-factor authentication enabled, you must generate an App Password from your account security settings instead of using your regular login password.

notes.outlook: Use your regular Microsoft account password; enable IMAP in Outlook settings
notes.zoho: Use your regular Zoho password or an app-specific password if 2FA is on

_imap_host_info.description: IMAP server hostname. Auto-filled by provider preset. Required if provider is null.

_imap_port_info.description: IMAP server port. Port 993 is the standard encrypted IMAP port (requires imap_use_ssl=true). All supported providers use 993.

_imap_use_ssl_info.description: Connect to the IMAP server using SSL/TLS from the start. Must be true when imap_port is 993. All supported providers require SSL.

_smtp_host_info.description: SMTP server hostname. Auto-filled by provider preset. Required if provider is null.

_smtp_port_info.description: SMTP server port. 587 uses STARTTLS (set smtp_use_tls=true, smtp_use_ssl=false). 465 uses SSL-on-connect (set smtp_use_ssl=true, smtp_use_tls=false). Port 587 with STARTTLS is the recommended modern standard.

port_guide.465: SSL/TLS on connect — set smtp_use_ssl=true and smtp_use_tls=false

_smtp_use_tls_info.description: Upgrade the SMTP connection to TLS using STARTTLS after connecting. Use with smtp_port=587. Mutually exclusive with smtp_use_ssl — only one may be true.

_smtp_use_ssl_info.description: Connect to the SMTP server using SSL/TLS from the start. Use with smtp_port=465. Mutually exclusive with smtp_use_tls — only one may be true.

_provider_reference._note: Full settings for every supported provider are listed here for reference. When provider is set, these are applied automatically.
